title: Wufoo Documentation
prompt_source: Inline docs prompt; CONNECTOR_DOCUMENTATION_GUIDELINES fetched via getDocGuidelines()

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
**Wufoo** is an online form-builder (a SurveyMonkey company) that exposes a REST API (v3) over a per-account, subdomain-specific base URL. This connector — `WufooConnector` (`CONNECTOR_TYPE = "wufoo"`, `AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`) — wraps the operational surfaces a Shielva tenant typically needs from a Wufoo account:

| Surface | Base path | Capability |
|---|---|---|
| Users | `/users.json` | List API-key-visible users (health probe) |
| Forms | `/forms.json` + `/forms/{id}.json` | List + read forms |
| Fields | `/forms/{id}/fields.json` | Field definitions for a form |
| Entries | `/forms/{id}/entries.json` | List + filter + create + delete + count entries |
| Comments | `/forms/{id}/comments.json` | Read + write comments on entries |
| Reports | `/reports.json` + `/reports/{id}.json` | List + read reports + widgets |
| Webhooks | `/forms/{id}/webhooks.json` + `/forms/{id}/webhooks/{hash}.json` | Register / list / unregister webhooks |

The connector normalises form entries into `NormalizedDocument` (composed id `f"{connector_id}_{form_hash}_{entry_id}"` keeps entries unique across forms), surfaces standalone `async def` methods per user-requested operation (OCP), retries 429 / 5xx with exponential backoff (3 attempts), and never embeds raw HTTP in `connector.py` (SOC — all HTTP delegated to `client/http_client.py::WufooHTTPClient`).

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content:
### 1. Find your Wufoo subdomain and API key

1. Sign in to https://www.wufoo.com.
2. The browser URL bar will read `https://{subdomain}.wufoo.com/admin/`. Copy the `{subdomain}` segment — that's the install field.
3. Open **Account → API Information** (top-right account menu).
4. Click **Create API Key** if you don't already have one. Copy the key value.

### 2. Install in ACP

In **ACP → Manage Connectors → Wufoo**, fill in:

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `subdomain` (string) | Your Wufoo subdomain (e.g. `acme`) |
| `api_key` (secret) | The API key from step 4 |
| `rate_limit_per_min` (number) | Soft cap, default 60 |
| `base_url` (string, optional) | Override `https://{subdomain}.wufoo.com/api/v3` for testing |

Click **Install**. `install()` validates `subdomain` + `api_key` are present, then probes `GET /users.json` to verify both the subdomain (URL) and the API key (Basic-auth header) in a single round-trip. On success it returns `ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, CONNECTED)` and persists the config.

### 3. First health check

The gateway calls `health_check()` which re-runs the `/users.json` probe. On 2xx → `HEALTHY + CONNECTED`. On 401 → `OFFLINE + TOKEN_EXPIRED` (the key was rotated). On 403 → `UNHEALTHY + INVALID_CREDENTIALS` (the key lacks scope). On 429 → `DEGRADED + CONNECTED` with a structured-log warning.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
Wufoo REST API (v3) uses **HTTP Basic authentication** (`AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`). No OAuth dance, no token refresh, no expiry.

### Credential model

- The API key is sent as the **HTTP Basic username**.
- The Basic password is the documented placeholder string `"footastic"` — Wufoo accepts any non-empty string here in practice, but the connector ships the placeholder to match the official docs.
- The base URL is built from the install-time `subdomain` field: `https://{subdomain}.wufoo.com/api/v3`. There is no shared, account-agnostic base URL.

### Lifecycle

| Phase | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| `install()` | Validates `subdomain` + `api_key`. Probes `GET /users.json` to verify both at once. Persists config on success. |
| `authorize(...)` | Returns a synthetic `TokenInfo(access_token=api_key, token_type="Basic")` for ABI parity — no real code-exchange. |
| `health_check()` | `GET /users.json` — minimal probe. |
| `ensure_token()` | Not called — no token to refresh. |
| token storage | None. |

### Header contract

Every outbound request:

```
Authorization: Basic base64(<api_key>:footastic)
Accept:        application/json
Content-Type:  application/x-www-form-urlencoded     ← POST / PUT only
```

The `Content-Type` header is set automatically when `form_data` is non-empty — Wufoo rejects `application/json` on POST/PUT to /entries, /comments, and /webhooks.

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
### Install fields (per-tenant)

Read via `self.config.get(...)` in `connector.py::__init__` — never hardcoded.

| Key | Type | Required | Read in code | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `subdomain` | string | yes | `self.subdomain` | Builds base URL `https://{subdomain}.wufoo.com/api/v3` |
| `api_key` | secret | yes | `self.api_key` | HTTP Basic auth username |
| `rate_limit_per_min` | number | no | `self.rate_limit_per_min` (default 60) | Client-side soft cap |
| `base_url` | string | no | overrides the subdomain-derived URL | Testing / proxy override |

### Class constants (provider-wide)

```python
REQUIRED_CONFIG_KEYS = ["subdomain", "api_key"]
_STATUS_MAP = {
    401: ("OFFLINE",   "TOKEN_EXPIRED"),
    403: ("UNHEALTHY", "INVALID_CREDENTIALS"),
    429: ("DEGRADED",  "CONNECTED"),
}
_WUFOO_PASSWORD_PLACEHOLDER = "footastic"   # Wufoo's documented placeholder
```

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content: All public async methods on `WufooConnector`. SOC: `connector.py` orchestrates only; HTTP lives in `client/http_client.py::WufooHTTPClient`. Method names match the Wufoo connector spec exactly: `list_forms`, `get_form`, `list_fields`, `list_entries`, `get_entry`, `create_entry`, `count_entries`, `delete_entry`, `list_reports`, `get_report`, `list_users`, `list_webhooks`, `create_webhook`, `delete_webhook`, `list_comments`, `add_comment`.

children.title: Lifecycle
children.content:
### `async install() -> ConnectorStatus`
Validate `subdomain` + `api_key`, then `GET /users.json` to verify creds. Persists config on success.

### `async authorize(auth_code, state) -> TokenInfo`
No-op for api_key auth — returns a synthetic TokenInfo with `access_token=api_key`.

### `async health_check() -> ConnectorStatus`
Probes `GET /users.json`. Classifies failures via `_STATUS_MAP`.

### `async sync(since=None, full=False, kb_id=None, webhook_url=None) -> SyncResult`
Iterates `/forms.json` → for each form pages through `/forms/{id}/entries.json` → normalizes each entry → `ingest_document`. Returns `SyncResult` with `documents_synced / _failed / _found`.

children.title: Users + Forms
children.content:
### `async list_users() -> Dict`
`GET /users.json` — every user the API key can see (also the health-probe surface).

### `async list_forms(*, include_todays_count=False) -> Dict`
`GET /forms.json` — summary metadata for all forms on the account.

### `async get_form(form_id: str) -> Dict`
`GET /forms/{form_id}.json`.

### `async list_fields(form_id, *, system=False) -> Dict`
`GET /forms/{form_id}/fields.json` — field definitions (`ID`, `Title`, `Type`, `IsRequired`, …).

children.title: Entries
children.content:
### `async list_entries(form_id, *, page_start=0, page_size=25, filter=None, sort=None, sort_direction="DESC", system=False) -> Dict`
`GET /forms/{form_id}/entries.json`. `filter` is a list of pre-built Wufoo filter strings (e.g. `"Field1 Is_equal_to John"`); the client forwards them as `Filter1, Filter2, …` with `match=AND`.

### `async get_entry(form_id, entry_id) -> Dict`
Resolves a single entry by `EntryId` — Wufoo v3 has no canonical `/entries/{id}` route, so the connector issues `GET /forms/{form_id}/entries.json?Filter1=EntryId Is_equal_to {entry_id}` with `pageSize=1`.

### `async create_entry(form_id, field_values: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict`
`POST /forms/{form_id}/entries.json`. `field_values` keys must be Wufoo field IDs (`Field1`, `Field2`, … or composite IDs like `Field5-first`). Body is sent as `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`. Raises `ValueError` on an empty dict.

### `async count_entries(form_id) -> Dict`
`GET /forms/{form_id}/entries/count.json` — returns `{"EntryCount": "N"}`.

### `async delete_entry(form_id, entry_id) -> Dict`
`DELETE /forms/{form_id}/entries/{entry_id}.json`.

children.title: Comments + Reports
children.content:
### `async list_comments(form_id, *, page_start=0, page_size=25) -> Dict`
`GET /forms/{form_id}/comments.json`.

### `async add_comment(form_id, entry_id, text, *, commenter_name=None) -> Dict`
`POST /forms/{form_id}/comments.json` — `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`.

### `async list_reports(*, include_todays_count=False) -> Dict`
`GET /reports.json`.

### `async get_report(report_id) -> Dict`
`GET /reports/{report_id}.json`.

### `async list_report_widgets(report_id) -> Dict`
`GET /reports/{report_id}/widgets.json`.

children.title: Webhooks
children.content:
### `async list_webhooks(form_id) -> Dict`
`GET /forms/{form_id}/webhooks.json`.

### `async create_webhook(form_id, url, *, handshake_key=None, metadata=False) -> Dict`
`PUT /forms/{form_id}/webhooks.json` — body is `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` (`url`, `handshakeKey`, `metadata`). `handshake_key` is an HMAC shared secret Wufoo signs deliveries with; `metadata=true` instructs Wufoo to include the form's field schema with each delivery payload.

### `async delete_webhook(form_id, webhook_hash) -> Dict`
`DELETE /forms/{form_id}/webhooks/{webhook_hash}.json` — unregister a previously-registered webhook.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
Exception hierarchy in `exceptions.py`:

```
WufooError                            # base; carries status_code + response_body
├── WufooAuthError                    # 401 / 403
├── WufooBadRequestError              # 400
├── WufooNotFoundError                # 404
├── WufooConflictError                # 409
├── WufooRateLimitError               # 429 — retry_after_s
└── WufooServerError                  # 5xx
```

Back-compat aliases preserved:
```
WufooNetworkError = WufooServerError    # legacy name from older code
WufooNotFound     = WufooNotFoundError
```

### Retry behaviour (`client/http_client.py::_request`)

| Status | Action |
|---|---|
| 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 / 409 | Raise immediately |
| 429 | Honour `Retry-After` if set; otherwise exponential backoff `_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_S * 2 ** attempt + jitter` clamped to `_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_S = 16s`. Retry up to `_MAX_TRANSPORT_RETRIES = 3`. |
| 5xx | Same exponential backoff, retry up to 3 |
| `httpx.TimeoutException` / `httpx.TransportError` | Backoff, retry up to 3, then raise `WufooNetworkError` |

### How errors surface to the gateway

`health_check()` catches exceptions and maps via `_STATUS_MAP`:

```
401 → ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, TOKEN_EXPIRED)
403 → ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, TOKEN_EXPIRED)        — same surface as 401
429 → ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, CONNECTED)            — logged as warning
5xx → ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, CONNECTED)
Network → ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, CONNECTED)
```

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
| Symptom | Probable cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, MISSING_CREDENTIALS)` at install | `subdomain` or `api_key` blank | Re-enter both in ACP. The subdomain is the prefix of your dashboard URL — `acme.wufoo.com` → `acme`. |
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, MISSING_CREDENTIALS)` at install with key set | The probe `GET /users.json` returned 401 — Wufoo rejected the key | Generate a new API key from **Account → API Information**. The old key may have been deleted or rotated. |
| DNS / network error at install | The `subdomain` doesn't match a real Wufoo account | Verify the subdomain matches your dashboard URL exactly (lowercase, no dots). |
| `ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, TOKEN_EXPIRED)` at health_check | 401 — API key revoked | Rotate the API key in Wufoo and update the secret in ACP. |
| `wufoo.http.retry` warnings spike | Hitting 429 (Wufoo's per-minute rate cap) | The client retries with exponential backoff. Lower `rate_limit_per_min` or batch fewer requests. |
| `create_entry` returns `{"Success": 0, ...}` with `FieldErrors` | Field IDs don't match Wufoo's schema | Call `list_fields(form_id)` first and key `field_values` by the `ID` (`Field1`, `Field2`, … or composite IDs like `Field5-first`). |
| `get_entry` returns an empty `Entries: []` | EntryId doesn't exist on that form | Confirm the `EntryId` (Wufoo IDs are per-form, not global). |
| `ImportError: cannot import name 'WufooNetworkError'` | Older `exceptions.py` without back-compat aliases | Already fixed — `WufooNetworkError = WufooServerError` alias added in `exceptions.py`. |
| Webhook payloads land but signature mismatch | `handshake_key` doesn't match what Wufoo signs with | Re-pass the same secret in both `create_webhook(handshake_key=...)` and your downstream verifier. |
